overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game showing a character walking along a rain-soaked neon-lit city street at night. The scene features holographic advertisements, wet reflective pavement, and futuristic urban architecture as the player overtakes a pedestrian and approaches an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial sidewalk with holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked sidewalk following a pedestrian in red pants

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red pants walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: rain-soaked tiled sidewalk reflecting neon lights
black metal railing separating sidewalk from street
large purple and pink holographic advertisement floating above street
tall modern glass building with illuminated interior
large digital billboard displaying animated content

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked cyberpunk city street at night, with the camera walking along a wet tiled sidewalk. Neon holograms and digital billboards illuminate the scene while reflecting off the pavement. A pedestrian in red pants walks ahead in the same direction, and modern glass buildings line the right side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk approaching intersection with traffic control signage

events.description: blue sedan drives past on the left side of the street
camera overtakes the pedestrian in red pants on the left

agents.ego_description: overtaking the pedestrian while a vehicle passes on the left, approaching a speed limit sign

notable_agents.action: blue sedan driving past on the wet multi-lane street

entered.detail: white rectangular sign with black text reading SPEED LIMIT 40 mounted on a pole
large yellow electrical utility box on the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues forward, a blue sedan drives past on the left. The pedestrian in red pants is overtaken and exits the frame. A speed limit 40 sign and yellow utility box come into view ahead, while the initial holographic billboards pass out of sight behind. The glass building on the right draws closer.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with crosswalk and speed limit signage

events.description: approaching the intersection corner with crosswalk markings becoming visible

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection corner where the speed limit sign and crosswalk are located

entered.detail: yellow and white striped crosswalk markings on the road surface

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the street corner intersection, with the speed limit 40 sign and yellow utility box now prominent in the near field. The metal railing has passed out of view behind, and crosswalk stripes become visible on the left side of the frame. The wet pavement continues to reflect the surrounding neon lights as the scene reaches the intersection threshold.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a rain-soaked cyberpunk street that transitions from a neon-lit corridor of billboards to an open urban intersection. It begins on a wet tiled sidewalk where vibrant holograms and digital advertisements reflect off the pavement as the camera follows a pedestrian in red pants. As the camera advances, a blue sedan drives past on the left and the pedestrian is overtaken, causing the initial holographic displays to recede while a glass building draws closer on the right. The scene then shifts toward the street corner, bringing a speed limit sign and a yellow utility box into prominent view as the metal railing disappears behind. Finally, the camera reaches the intersection threshold, where white crosswalk stripes emerge on the left amidst the persistent glow of neon reflections on the wet ground.
